title: 数字化转型与国际化战略
topics: 数字化转型工作方案讨论 (Digital Transformation Work Plan Discussion)
技术平台选型 (Technology Platform Selection)
国际化战略实施 (Internationalization Strategy Implementation)
AI技术应用规划 (AI Technology Application Planning)

contents.topic: 数字化转型工作方案讨论
points: 分析了当前数字化发展形势 (Analyzed current digital development situation)
讨论了数字化转型的必要性 (Discussed the necessity of digital transformation)
明确了数字化转型的目标 (Clarified digital transformation goals)
评估了技术风险和技术债务 (Assessed technical risks and technical debt)
Review of international market analysis report
讨论本地化策略和跨文化沟通 (Discussion on localization strategy and cross-cultural communication)
评估海外团队建设方案 (Evaluation of overseas team building plan)
制定国际市场进入策略 (Develop international market entry strategy)

resolutions.content: 原则通过《数字化转型工作方案》 (Principles approved "Digital Transformation Work Plan")
批准国际化战略试点项目 (Approve internationalization strategy pilot project)

next_steps: 技术部负责完善方案细节 (Technology Department responsible for improving plan details)
人力资源部负责人员培训安排 (HR Department arranges training)
财务部负责预算编制 (Finance Department prepares budget)
国际业务部启动试点项目 (International Business Department launches pilot project)
other_matters: 下次会议时间：2026年4月15日 (Next meeting: April 15, 2026)
会议材料需提前3天分发 (Meeting materials need to be distributed 3 days in advance)
Action items will be tracked in JIRA project management system
